commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=8bb3b739c06696e833d75ed41dc4e04c19ed1ae1)
commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the bundled session-memory transcript reader to skip delivery-mirror assistant entries and collapse consecutive duplicate assistant text, with regression tests for the linked duplication report.

PR surface: Source +19, Tests +82. Total +101 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main extracts text from consecutive assistant rows, so raw-thinking plus cleaned-text rows with the same visible text produce duplicate `assistant:` lines. I did not run a live thinking-enabled model flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The branch needs contributor or maintainer revision plus real behavior proof before merge; automated repair should not substitute for the missing external setup proof.

target.title: fix(session-memory): skip delivery-mirror entries and dedup consecutive identical assistant messages (#92563)
target.body:
## Summary

`getRecentSessionContent` in the session-memory hook would produce duplicate
`assistant:` lines when thinking-enabled models caused two entries to be
written to the session JSONL for the same assistant response.

Two fixes:

1. **Skip `delivery-mirror` entries** — messages with `provider: "openclaw"`
   and `model: "delivery-mirror"` are delivery bookkeeping artifacts that
   duplicate the visible text of the preceding assistant message.

2. **Dedupe consecutive identical assistant messages** — a safety net that
   prevents any other path from producing redundant rows.

Fixes #92563

## Verification

- [x] All 26 existing tests pass (23 original + 3 new)
- [x] New test: delivery-mirror messages are skipped
- [x] New test: consecutive identical assistant messages deduped
- [x] New test: consecutive different assistant messages preserved

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: fsdwen
